question: Which accounts does the app track, and are they all API-visible?
options: All accounts at E*TRADE incl. rollover IRAs — fully API-visible
context: Depends on 3f1b6b21 (E*TRADE API). The Excel '401(k)' bucket is actually tax-deferred money mostly rolled over into rollover IRA accounts at E*TRADE. Terminology: model has two buckets — 'tax-deferred' (rollover IRAs, taxed on withdrawal) and 'post-tax' (taxable brokerage).
